schema.sample_id: string — UUID of the recorded sample
schema.audio_file_path: string — relative path to per-speaker audio
schema.video_file_path: string — relative path to per-speaker video
schema.combined_video_file_path: string — relative path to combined two-speaker video
schema.dynamic_time_start: number — onset of the dynamic, seconds from clip start
schema.dynamic_time_end: number — offset of the dynamic, seconds from clip start
